nasb.text: The people thus contended with Moses and spoke, saying, “If only we had perished when our brothers perished before the Lord!

esv.text: And the people quarreled with Moses and said, “Would that we had perished when our brothers perished before the Lord!

cnv.text: 人民與摩西爭鬧，說：“但願我們的兄弟在耶和華面前死去的時候，我們也一同死去！

ccb.text: 他们埋怨说：“还不如当初跟我们的弟兄一起死在耶和华面前！
